name: 16S_primer_805R_V4
description: Conserved 16S primer-binding site '805R_V4' (length 21 bp, E. coli position ~785). Consensus: GACTACNVGGGTATCTAATCC. EMP V4 reverse; Apprill 2015. Universal across most Bacteria; minimal real-biology mismatch expected — mapper should NOT tolerate high mismatch here.
